phaseHistory.notes: Audit complete + DashboardPage mobile redesign: replaced circle-button sidebar + bottom-sheets with horizontal tab bar + inline scrollable content. Task rows simplified for narrow widths (FROM/SOURCE columns hidden). Brain tab shown by default. BrainPage mobile was already in good shape.
Phase counter corrected post-hoc — Solo 5/7 advanced state via Bash because Brain MCP was unreachable, set phase=1 instead of 2.
Justs deployed manually from main session (rsync + docker compose build/up brain-viz). Live on https://goodhealth.lv/dashboard.

teacherReviews.feedback: Accepted in conversation 2026-04-25 morning recap — work shipped.

notes: UX bug fix is legitimate and important: activeSheet defaulted to all-tasks but no section had that key — users saw blank screen on mobile load.
Tab bar replacing circle-button sidebar is standard mobile UX. Brain tab as default is the right call.
compact prop flows cleanly through hierarchy. Safe area handling is proper.
issues: MobileCircleButton and MobileBottomSheet are now dead code (~90 lines). Should be removed.
Tab labels are emoji/single-letter only. Minor — acceptable for v1.
